description: TCEL Tenant-9 T9-038-Decision-Support-Optimization package, generated from the spec folder as ECARMF knowledge-package metadata (structure faithful; universal AI-boundary/cross-tenant controls enforced, full control catalog carried as a knowledge asset for traceability). Depends on Foundation; does NOT re-declare RecordReceived; cross-package name collisions auto-omitted by the generator's claimed-names ledger.
name: TCEL T9-038-Decision-Support-Optimization

rules.name: No AI execution
rules.reasonTemplate: DS-016: denied - an AI agent may not take material actions; agents are advisory-only (AI Governance).

rules.name: Cross-tenant denial
rules.reasonTemplate: DS-018: access denied - cross-tenant access is prohibited (Security).

capabilities.name: TCEL T9-038-Decision-Support-Optimization
capabilities.description: Domain capability generated from the T9 spec.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-038-Decision-Support-Optimization Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: DS-016/DS-018 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: DS-001 Decision registration | Governance | Require documented compliance: Decision registration | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-002 Authority validation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Authority validation | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-003 Alternative completeness | Governance | Require documented compliance: Alternative completeness | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-004 Constraint validation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Constraint validation | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-005 Source certification | Governance | Require documented compliance: Source certification | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-006 Impact aggregation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Impact aggregation | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-007 Risk review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Risk review | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-008 Compliance review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Compliance review | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-009 Financial impact | Governance | Require documented compliance: Financial impact | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-010 Operational impact | Governance | Require documented compliance: Operational impact | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-011 Dissent preservation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Dissent preservation | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-012 Optimization model approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Optimization model approval | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-013 Uncertainty visible | Governance | Require documented compliance: Uncertainty visible | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-014 Human approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Human approval | Critical | Strategy Office. DS-015 No AI final decision | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: No AI final decision | Critical | AI Governance. DS-016 No AI execution | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: No AI execution | High | AI Governance. DS-017 Outcome tracking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Outcome tracking | High | Strategy Office. DS-018 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | High | Security. DS-019 Evidence pack | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Evidence pack | High | Strategy Office. DS-020 Versioning | Governance | Require documented compliance: Versioning | High | Strategy Office. DS-021 Conflict disclosure | Governance | Require documented compliance: Conflict disclosure | High | Strategy Office. DS-022 Scenario comparison | Governance | Require documented compliance: Scenario comparison | High | Strategy Office. DS-023 Recommendation expiry | Governance | Require documented compliance: Recommendation expiry | High | Strategy Office. DS-024 Audit trail | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Audit trail | High | Strategy Office. DS-025 Recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Strategy Office.
